Video.summary: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Ilies Mardhi v. Daniel Viveros.

Video.summary: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Randy Cura vs. Alexandre Bouderbane
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Randy Cura vs. Alexandre Bouderbane

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Randy Cura vs. Alexandre Bouderbane

KARATE COMBAT: GENESIS - Randy Cura vs. Alexandre Bouderbane

Video.summary: The School of Hard Knocks 23 filmed at the Subway Soccer Center in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Dia Grant vs. Julius Huhs; Paapa Inkumsah vs. Jared "The Milkman" Milko; Kayla Matton vs. Chaleur "The Chainsaw" Jones.

Video.summary: Nate Oses learns from everyone he can, including some of the top fighters in MMA. He aspires not only to be a well-prepared fighter but to eventually move on to be a coach and mentor himself, helping to form great fighters in the future.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Nate Oses
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Nate Oses

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Nate Oses
Out of the Cage - Nate Oses
Out of the Cage - Nate Oses

Video.summary: Going from dancing to fighting is not as drastically different as you might think! Chaleur Jones prioitizes balancing good health and her busy lifestyle to maximize her training.

Video.summary: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.
Video.grandparentTitle: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
Video.title: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Image.alt: KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry
KARATE COMBAT: ONE WORLD - Andras Virag vs. Adham Sabry

Video.summary: In this episode, Melissa Croden speaks about some of the things she struggles with as a fighter and how she overcomes those obstacles. Find out how Melissa started out this fight with nerves and anxiety but how she pulled out a huge win against Brittany Paterson.

Video.summary: Ukraine born Anton Tokarchuck is known for his massive knock outs. At HK35, he takes on Jesse Day Rider - a fighter who has never been knocked out. Anton has worked incredibly hard at the gym for this and is looking to continue his knock out winning streak.
Video.grandparentTitle: Out of the Cage - Anton Tokarchuk
Video.title: Out of the Cage - Anton Tokarchuk

Image.alt: Out of the Cage - Anton Tokarchuk
Out of the Cage - Anton Tokarchuk
Out of the Cage - Anton Tokarchuk

Video.summary: Peel back the curtain to find out the goals and challenges of a Mixed Martial Arts fighter’s everyday life, and how it’s not much different than yours. Featuring Connor McNeice.
